entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: NONNODULATION
entities.description: The failure of a plant to form nodules on its roots.

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming nodules on roots.

entities.name: INTENSITY OF NODULATION
entities.description: The quantitative degree of nodule formation.

entities.name: DUPLICATE RECESSIVE GENES
entities.description: A genetic mechanism where two recessive genes control a trait.

entities.name: SINGLE RECESSIVE GENE
entities.description: A genetic mechanism where one recessive gene controls a trait.

entities.name: F2 POPULATIONS
entities.description: The second filial generation used for genetic analysis.

entities.name: F3 PROGENIES
entities.description: The third filial generation used for genetic analysis.

entities.name: TRIGENIC RATIO
entities.description: A segregation ratio involving three genes, specifically 61 nodulating to 3 nonnodulating.

entities.name: DUPLICATE DIGENIC RATIO
entities.description: A segregation ratio involving two duplicate genes, specifically 15 nodulating to 1 nonnodulating.

entities.name: DUPLICATE FACTOR MODEL
entities.description: A genetic model based on duplicate gene action.

entities.name: GENETIC MODEL
entities.description: A proposed model involving three genes to explain the inheritance of nonnodulation.

entities.name: MAJOR GENES
entities.description: Genes that have a significant effect on the occurrence of a trait.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIAL HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: The state of having different alleles at various loci in the parents.
